name: usePointerLock
description: Hook that provides reactive pointer lock
examples: const { supported, lock, unlock, element } = usePointerLock();

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the pointer lock element and functions to interact with the pointer lock

source.source: * @returns {UsePointerLockReturn} An object containing the pointer lock element and functions to interact with the pointer lock
